candidate.completion: put me on hold with customer service so I can hear another human voice.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me on hold with customer service so I can hear another human voice.

evaluation.rationale: A clear, humane comic turn: loneliness is reframed through the degrading specificity of customer-service hold time. The premise is fresh and truthful, but the sentence is relatively long and lands more as a rueful observation than a sharply quotable piece of classic wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop calling my two-person table 'optimistic seating.'
